General.Name: Star Holdings
General.Description: Star Holdings engages in the non-ground lease real estate assets business in the United States. The company portfolio comprises Asbury Park Waterfront and Magnolia Green residential development projects. It also engages in the asset management activities; sale of existing loans; and operation of land and development properties. Star Holdings was incorporated in 2022 and is based in New York, New York.
General.Address: 1114 Avenue of the Americas, New York, NY, United States, 10036
